category_sources: source_facts.description says console hex editor; official source_facts.homepage is yx7.cc/code and source archive is from yx7.cc/code/hyx.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is hyx; source_facts.homepage and source archive path identify the project as hyx.
docs_sources: Official source_facts.homepage is yx7.cc/code and is the best official project surface found; Ubuntu manpage mirrors the packaged hyx.1 manual for usage details.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.source-archive is an official yx7.cc tarball, but no official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says powerful console hex editor; package/manpage descriptions identify hyx as a minimalistic vim-like terminal hex editor.
